title: Calories Burned Cycling 30 Minutes (By Speed and Body Weight)
introduction: Cycling is one of the most efficient cardio options for calorie burn. Here is how many calories you can burn in 30 minutes based on your body weight and cycling intensity.

sections.heading: 🚴 Quick Answer: 30-Minute Cycling Calories
sections.content:
| Body Weight | Easy (10-12 mph) | Moderate (12-14 mph) | Vigorous (14-16+ mph) |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 120 lb (54 kg) | 120-170 kcal | 170-220 kcal | 220-300 kcal |
| 150 lb (68 kg) | 150-210 kcal | 210-280 kcal | 280-360 kcal |
| 180 lb (82 kg) | 180-250 kcal | 250-330 kcal | 330-430 kcal |
| 210 lb (95 kg) | 210-290 kcal | 290-390 kcal | 390-500 kcal |

Use the [Calorie Burn Calculator](/tools/calorie-burn-calculator) to match your exact pace and body weight.

sections.heading: Stationary Bike vs Outdoor Cycling
sections.content:
| Mode | Typical Burn Difference |
| --- | --- |
| Stationary bike, steady | Reliable baseline |
| Outdoor bike, flat road | Similar to steady indoor |
| Outdoor hills/wind | Often higher burn |
| Spin intervals | High short-term burn |

Outdoor resistance and interval sessions usually increase total burn.

sections.heading: How to Burn More Calories in 30 Minutes
sections.content:
Simple upgrades:

• Increase cadence in short intervals
• Add resistance blocks every 5 minutes
• Keep rest periods short
• Progress intensity weekly

These changes can raise your 30-minute burn by 15-35%.

sections.heading: Use Cycling Burn for Weight Loss Planning
sections.content:
Cycling works best with a full nutrition plan.

| Step | Action |
| --- | --- |
| 1 | Calculate burn from your 30-minute sessions |
| 2 | Set a realistic calorie target |
| 3 | Track workouts + meals daily |
| 4 | Adjust based on 2-4 week trends |

Use Eati to track your intake and avoid erasing workout burn with untracked snacks.

midArticleCta: Calculate your 30-minute cycling calories and track your intake in Eati so your cardio actually moves the scale trend.
conclusion: A 30-minute cycling session can burn a lot of calories, especially at moderate-to-vigorous effort. Use the calculator for realistic estimates and combine that with daily tracking in Eati for consistent fat-loss progress.
metaTitle: Calories Burned Cycling 30 Minutes: Speed & Weight Chart
metaDescription: See calories burned cycling 30 minutes by speed and body weight. Compare moderate and vigorous cycling burn for weight-loss planning.

faqs.question: Does interval cycling burn more than steady cycling?
faqs.answer: Usually yes, because higher average intensity increases energy expenditure during the session and can raise post-workout oxygen demand.

faqs.question: Can beginners use cycling for fat loss?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Start with manageable intensity and duration, then progress gradually while keeping nutrition aligned with your calorie target.
